sourceMovie.title: Beast of War
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Beast of War works as a thriller movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The thriller and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Guy Ritchie's The Covenant
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Beast of War clicked for you, Guy Ritchie's The Covenant (2023) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Tom Clancy's Without Remorse
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Beast of War clicked for you, Tom Clancy's Without Remorse (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Primitive War
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Beast of War clicked for you, Primitive War (2025) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and war, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Jaws
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Beast of War clicked for you, Jaws (1975) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Beast of War?
faq.answer: Try Guy Ritchie's The Covenant, Tom Clancy's Without Remorse, Primitive War—each shares DNA with Beast of War while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Beast of War?
faq.answer: Beast of War (2025) is best described as Thriller, Action, War, Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Beast of War worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
